title: PvP Hit Sound
description: Adds a satisfying “pling” sound when you land a fully charged sword hit on another player.
body:
# PvP Hit Sound

This mod plays a “pling” sound (like a bow hit) whenever you land a fully charged hit on a player.

# Features
- sound only plays on > 80% charged hits
- helps you tell if you timed your hit right

**Please give me your feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
